title: Pure Core, UI Adapters, Dependency Direction, and Snapshots · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed puzzle review reconstructs pure core, ui adapters, dependency direction, and snapshots from revision, configuration, seed, topology, frontier, predecessor map, state transition, draw record, accessibility report, profile, artifact, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for pure maze core with Tk adapter ports after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep topology, generation, search, state transitions, and evidence free of Tk widget and operating-system dependencies.
Define narrow render, scheduling, input, status, dialog, persistence, and clock ports owned by the application layer.
Publish immutable or copied snapshots so rendering and tests cannot mutate authoritative state accidentally.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Demonstrate pure-core tests, fake adapters, dependency inspection, native adapter smoke, and changed implementation evidence.
